import PageExample from '@site/src/components/PageExample';
import { ServiceApplicationPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<PageExample>
  <ServiceApplicationPage
    serviceName="Trade Ministry"
    languages={[
      { code: 'en', label: 'English' },
      { code: 'am', label: 'ßŖĀßłøßłŁßŖø' },
    ]}
    locale="en"
    onLocale={() => {}}
    breadcrumb={[
      { label: 'Home', href: '/' },
      { label: 'Services', href: '/services' },
      { label: 'Apply for a business licence' },

    footerGroups={[{ title: 'About', links: [{ label: 'Accessibility', href: '/accessibility' }] }]}

  />

The multi-step application itself ŌĆö hosts the
[Application Submission pattern](/docs/patterns/application-submission)
inside the standard page frame. Try the full flow above: it succeeds and
shows a real confirmation reference.

```tsx
import { ServiceApplicationPage } from '@ethds/templates';

<ServiceApplicationPage
  serviceName="Trade Ministry"
  languages={languages}
  locale="en"
  onLocale={(code) => { /* ŌĆ” */ }}
  breadcrumb={breadcrumb}
  onSubmit={async (data) => {
    /* submit the application; data: ApplicationData */
    return { reference: 'ETH-2026-00412' };
  }}
/>
```

## When to use this template

Use this as the destination for a [Service Landing Page](service-landing-page)'s
**Start now** action.

## Accessibility & localization

- Each step of the hosted [Application Submission](/docs/patterns/application-submission)
  pattern renders its own `<h1>`, so this page adds no competing heading
  ŌĆö one `<h1>` per screen is preserved across the whole application.
- All the pattern's own accessibility guidance (focus-on-step-change, a
  focusable error summary, Redundant Entry via the Review step's Change
  links) applies unchanged.
- `initialData` lets a returning citizen resume without being re-asked for
  known data.

## Plain HTML

This page's whole body **is** the
[Application Submission pattern](/docs/patterns/application-submission#plain-html)
ŌĆö without a client framework, "the Service Application Page" is a small
family of pages (`/apply/passport/1`, `/apply/passport/2`, ŌĆ”), each
wearing the standard [Header](/docs/components/header#plain-html)/[Breadcrumb](/docs/components/breadcrumb#plain-html)/[Footer](/docs/components/footer#plain-html)
chrome around one step of the pattern's own HTML Example. See the
[template's own HTML Example](https://github.com/yidnekachewkibru/ethgov-design-system/blob/main/packages/ethds-templates/templates/service-application-page.md#html-example)
for the full page.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|
| `serviceName` | `ReactNode` | Yes |
| `nav` | `HeaderNavItem[]` | No |
| `languages` | `LanguageOption[]` | Yes |
| `locale` | `string` | Yes |
| `onLocale` | `(code: string) => void` | Yes |
| `breadcrumb` | `BreadcrumbItem[]` | Yes |
| `footerGroups` | `FooterLinkGroup[]` | No |
| `copyright` | `ReactNode` | No |
| `initialData` | `Partial<ApplicationData>` | No |
| `onSaveDraft` | `(data: Partial<ApplicationData>) => void \| Promise<void>` | No |
| `onSubmit` | `(data: ApplicationData) => Promise<SubmitResult>` | Yes |
| `regions` | `SelectOption[]` | No ŌĆö has defaults |
| `activities` | `RadioOption[]` | No ŌĆö has defaults |
| `labels` | `Partial<ApplicationSubmissionFlowLabels>` | No |
